audience: Multibrand retailers assessing custom multisite CMS and ecommerce architecture
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Begrijpen hoe een multi-site platform gedeelde kerngegevens combineert met afzonderlijke websites, shops en instellingen.

searchIntent.question: How can a multisite ecommerce platform share suitable core data while keeping each site distinct?

directAnswer: Pelletkachelzorg is developing a multisite CMS and ecommerce platform that combines shared core data with site-specific domains, presentation, shop settings and communication.
title: Pelletkachelzorg multisite CMS and ecommerce platform
metaDescription: Explore the Pelletkachelzorg platform in development, including multisite CMS, catalogue, stock, Mollie payments, server-side checkout, visual builders and a communication centre.
factsToPreserve: The platform is still in development
Server-side validation of prices, options and stock
